# ⚠️ Pull Requests Not Accepted

**This repository does not accept external pull requests.**

---

## Thank you for your interest!

While we appreciate your enthusiasm, this is a **maintainer-only repository** and external contributions are not accepted at this time.

### What You Can Do Instead

#### 🐛 Found a Bug?
Please [open an issue](https://github.com/ABMJ/tenable-sc-mcp-server/issues/new?labels=bug) with:
- Clear description and reproduction steps
- Expected vs actual behavior
- Environment details

#### 💡 Have a Feature Request?
Please [open an issue](https://github.com/ABMJ/tenable-sc-mcp-server/issues/new?labels=enhancement) with:
- Description of the feature
- Use case and motivation
- Expected behavior

#### 🍴 Want to Modify the Code?
You're welcome to **fork this repository** and make changes for your own use!

```bash
# Fork on GitHub, then:
git clone https://github.com/YOUR_USERNAME/tenable-sc-mcp-server.git
```

See [LICENSE](../LICENSE) for terms of use.

---

## Why No External PRs?

This project follows a **maintainer-driven development model** to ensure:
- Architectural consistency with strict design principles
- Token optimization for LLM efficiency
- Alignment with planned roadmap
- High quality and thorough documentation

See [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md) for more details.

---

## Repository Philosophy

**For Users:**
- Use the MCP server via Docker or from source
- Report bugs and request features via issues
- Fork and customize for your needs

**For Maintainer:**
- All development follows [DESIGN_PRINCIPLES.md](../DESIGN_PRINCIPLES.md)
- Features implemented per [TOOLS_ROADMAP.md](../TOOLS_ROADMAP.md)
- See workflow section in DESIGN_PRINCIPLES.md

---

**This PR will be closed.** Please use the alternatives above. Thank you for understanding! 🙏
